title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: A thoughtful story about choices, regret, and the many lives one person could have lived.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A practical guide to writing readable, maintainable, and professional software.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An accessible journey through cosmology, black holes, time, and the universe.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A symbolic adventure about dreams, destiny, and personal legend.

title: You Don't Know JS Yet
author: Kyle Simpson
description: A deep technical exploration of JavaScript fundamentals and advanced concepts.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: A science classic explaining evolution through the perspective of genes.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building better habits and improving life through tiny changes.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
author: Martin Kleppmann
description: A detailed guide to scalable systems, distributed data, reliability, and maintainability.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: A poetic scientific journey through space, life, and human curiosity.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A fantasy adventure following Bilbo Baggins through treasure, danger, and courage.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
description: A comprehensive textbook on algorithms, data structures, and computational thinking.

title: The Gene
author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
description: A powerful history of genetics and how heredity shapes life.
